description_long: This house features a striking modern architectural design with a mix of geometric forms and flat planes. The exterior is characterized by a combination of dark and light wall panels, large blue-tinted windows, and a flat, multi-level roof with visible overhangs and terraces. The structure sits on a rectangular plot with a patterned ground surface, including a walkway leading to the main entrance and green lawn areas. The house has multiple stories, with a prominent central section and several protruding volumes, creating visual interest and depth. The window arrangement is asymmetrical, with some large picture windows and smaller square windows distributed across the facade. The entryway is defined by a covered porch area, steps, and a distinct overhang, providing a sheltered and welcoming approach.
description: A modern, multi-story house with flat roofs, large blue windows, and a mix of dark and light exterior panels, set on a patterned lot with green lawns and a covered entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large blue windows, and a mix of light and dark panels with a prominent flat roof and steps leading up.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extended terrace, additional windows, and the layered roof structure with visible green lawn areas.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying more asymmetrical window placements, a secondary entrance or patio area, and the continuation of the flat roof design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a covered porch, additional entry points, and the interplay of geometric volumes and window placements.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and smaller square windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with steps, flat overhang, and a prominent main door
